title: clean my house
description: We are seeking a reliable and detail-oriented house cleaner to maintain a tidy living environment. Responsibilities include dusting, vacuuming, mopping floors, cleaning bathrooms, kitchen surfaces, and organizing common areas. Additional tasks may involve laundry, window cleaning, and deep cleaning on a rotating schedule. Ideal candidates should have previous cleaning experience, excellent time management skills, and a commitment to using eco-friendly products. Flexibility in scheduling is preferred. If you take pride in creating a clean and welcoming home, we’d love to hear from you!

title: clean my house
